title: Ōkami
body:
Get ready to be transported to a world of wonder and beauty with the Okami Resource Pack!
Based on the acclaimed 2006 PS2 game Okami, 
The Okami Resource Pack has cel-shaded visuals and Ukiyo-e influenced textures. 

this pack is 100% vanilla friendly no need for mods such as optifine features such as the custom skybox and colour changed exp where implamented via the vanilla shader system make sure to enable fabulous graphics for these features to work.   

This pack is unfinished but still great.
